'''鈭歮-p-dh''' ('''mapadha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbeauty|unbeauty]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-p-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbeauty|unbeauty]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-p-dh
|-
! Lemma
| mapadha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mapadhithi|mapadhithi]] || [[word:mapadhiji|mapadhiji]] || [[word:mapadhishi|mapadhishi]] || [[word:mapadhi|mapadhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mapadhuthuth|mapadhuthuth]] || [[word:mapadhujuj|mapadhujuj]] || [[word:mapadhushush|mapadhushush]] || [[word:mapadh|mapadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mapadhuthu|mapadhuthu]] || [[word:mapadhuju|mapadhuju]] || [[word:mapadhushu|mapadhushu]] || [[word:mapadhu|mapadhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mapadhufuth|mapadhufuth]] || [[word:mapadhufuj|mapadhufuj]] || [[word:mapadhufush|mapadhufush]] || [[word:mapadhuf|mapadhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mapadhethe|mapadhethe]] || [[word:mapadheje|mapadheje]] || [[word:mapadheshe|mapadheshe]] || [[word:mapadhe|mapadhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mapadhothoth|mapadhothoth]] || [[word:mapadhojoj|mapadhojoj]] || [[word:mapadhoshosh|mapadhoshosh]] || [[word:mapadh|mapadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mapadhotho|mapadhotho]] || [[word:mapadhojo|mapadhojo]] || [[word:mapadhosho|mapadhosho]] || [[word:mapadho|mapadho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mapadhofoth|mapadhofoth]] || [[word:mapadhofoj|mapadhofoj]] || [[word:mapadhofosh|mapadhofosh]] || [[word:mapadhof|mapadhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mapadh忙th忙|mapadh忙th忙]] || [[word:mapadh忙j忙|mapadh忙j忙]] || [[word:mapadh忙sh忙|mapadh忙sh忙]] || [[word:mapadh忙|mapadh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mapadhathath|mapadhathath]] || [[word:mapadhajaj|mapadhajaj]] || [[word:mapadhashash|mapadhashash]] || [[word:mapadh|mapadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mapadhatha|mapadhatha]] || [[word:mapadhaja|mapadhaja]] || [[word:mapadhasha|mapadhasha]] || [[word:mapadha|mapadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mapadhafath|mapadhafath]] || [[word:mapadhafaj|mapadhafaj]] || [[word:mapadhafash|mapadhafash]] || [[word:mapadhaf|mapadhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:mapadhasha|mapadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gomapadhasha|gomapadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokimapadhasha|gokimapadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:mapadhn眉sha|mapadhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gomapadhnkn眉sha|gomapadhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokimapadhn眉sha|gokimapadhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mapadhsh毛sha|mapadhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomapadhnksh毛sha|gomapadhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimapadhsh毛sha|gokimapadhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mapadhrosha|mapadhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomapadhnkrosha|gomapadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimapadhrosha|gokimapadhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mapadhmusha|mapadhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gomapadhnkmusha|gomapadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimapadhmusha|gokimapadhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:mapadhsherasha|mapadhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gomapadhnksherasha|gomapadhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokimapadhsherasha|gokimapadhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:mapadhngasha|mapadhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gomapadhnkngasha|gomapadhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokimapadhngasha|gokimapadhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mapadhyasha|mapadhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gomapadhnkyasha|gomapadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokimapadhyasha|gokimapadhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:mapadhyamasha|mapadhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gomapadhnkyamasha|gomapadhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokimapadhyamasha|gokimapadhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:mapadhn眉sh毛sha|mapadhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomapadhnkn眉sh毛sha|gomapadhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimapadhn眉sh毛sha|gokimapadhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mapadhn眉rosha|mapadhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomapadhnkn眉rosha|gomapadhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimapadhn眉rosha|gokimapadhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mapadhn眉musha|mapadhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomapadhnkn眉musha|gomapadhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimapadhn眉musha|gokimapadhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:mapadhsh毛n眉sha|mapadhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomapadhnksh毛n眉sha|gomapadhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimapadhsh毛n眉sha|gokimapadhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mapadhsh毛rosha|mapadhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomapadhnksh毛rosha|gomapadhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimapadhsh毛rosha|gokimapadhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mapadhsh毛musha|mapadhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomapadhnksh毛musha|gomapadhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimapadhsh毛musha|gokimapadhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:mapadhron眉sha|mapadhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomapadhnkron眉sha|gomapadhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimapadhron眉sha|gokimapadhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:mapadhrosh毛sha|mapadhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomapadhnkrosh毛sha|gomapadhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimapadhrosh毛sha|gokimapadhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mapadhromusha|mapadhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomapadhnkromusha|gomapadhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimapadhromusha|gokimapadhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:mapadhmun眉sha|mapadhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomapadhnkmun眉sha|gomapadhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimapadhmun眉sha|gokimapadhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:mapadhmush毛sha|mapadhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomapadhnkmush毛sha|gomapadhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimapadhmush毛sha|gokimapadhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mapadhmurosha|mapadhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomapadhnkmurosha|gomapadhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimapadhmurosha|gokimapadhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:mapadh|mapadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:m忙p忙dh|m忙p忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:homapadh|homapadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hom忙p忙dh|hom忙p忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomapadh|hohomapadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohom忙p忙dh|hohom忙p忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉mapadh|n眉mapadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉m忙p忙dh|n眉m忙p忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉mapadh|n眉n眉mapadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉m忙p忙dh|n眉n眉m忙p忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂mapadh|n茂mapadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂m忙p忙dh|n茂m忙p忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂mapadh|n茂n茂mapadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂m忙p忙dh|n茂n茂m忙p忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lumapadh|lumapadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lum忙p忙dh|lum忙p忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumapadh|lulumapadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulum忙p忙dh|lulum忙p忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:limapadh|limapadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lim忙p忙dh|lim忙p忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimapadh|lilimapadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilim忙p忙dh|lilim忙p忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:komapadh|komapadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kom忙p忙dh|kom忙p忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomapadh|kokomapadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokom忙p忙dh|kokom忙p忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kemapadh|kemapadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kem忙p忙dh|kem忙p忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemapadh|kekemapadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekem忙p忙dh|kekem忙p忙dh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
